user.title: SberBoom — speaker IP
user.description: Enter the local IP of your SberBoom speaker.

data.client_name: Client name (will be visible in your Sber account)

discovery_confirm.title: {name} discovered

data.client_name: Client name (will be visible in your Sber account)

pair.title: Confirm pairing
pair.description:
{name} ({host}) is waiting for confirmation.

**Press the "+" button on the speaker**, then submit.

(Timeout: {timeout} seconds)

reconfigure.title: Update {name} address
reconfigure.description: Change the IP/port of an already-paired speaker. The pairing token is preserved.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-pair {name}
reauth_confirm.description:
{name} ({host}) needs re-authorization (e.g. after a factory reset).

**Press the "+" button on the speaker**, then submit.

(Timeout: {timeout} seconds)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the speaker. Check the IP/port and LAN reachability.
error.pair_timeout: The "+" button was not pressed in time. Try again.

abort.incomplete_discovery: Discovered service is missing required device id.

init.title: {name} is unreachable
init.description: If the speaker got a new IP address (e.g. from DHCP), enter it below — the pairing token is kept, no re-pairing needed. Make sure the speaker is powered on and reachable from Home Assistant.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the speaker at this address. Check the IP/port and LAN reachability.

init.title: SBoom options
init.description: Tune polling intervals and feature toggles. Changes apply immediately (the integration auto-reloads).

data.lyrics_netease_fallback: Use NetEase as a fallback lyrics source
data.lyrics_offset: Lyrics timing offset, seconds (+ earlier / − later)

no_loaded_speakers.message: No loaded SBoom speakers match this call. Check that the integration is set up and the device is targeted correctly.

refresh_metadata.name: Refresh metadata
refresh_metadata.description: Force-fetch the current track and speaker state without waiting for the poll cycle.

reauth.name: Re-authenticate (re-pair)
reauth.description: Start the re-pairing process. Press the "+" button on the speaker after calling the service.

bluetooth_device.name: Bluetooth device command
bluetooth_device.description: Connect, disconnect or remove a paired Bluetooth device of the speaker.

mac_address.name: MAC address
mac_address.description: Bluetooth device MAC (see the devices attribute of the Paired Bluetooth devices sensor).
